rulings.Case Title: EVANS PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. GUSTAVO RIOS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 23, 2012, line 6. PLAINTIFF EVANS PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER continued to 2/6/2012 per stipulation. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MURPHY INVESTMENTS, INC., A CALIFORNIA VS. JOY LEFCOURT COX et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 23, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANT JOY COX' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT continued to 1/25/12 to be heard with motion for judgment on the pleadings. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PNC MORTGAGE, A DIVISION OF PNC BANK, NATIONAL VS. WAI CHEUNG et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 23, 2012, line 1. PLAINTIFF PNC MORTGAGE, A DIVISION OF PNC BANK, NATIONAL MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Deny Motion for summary judgment. Moving party failed to shift burden. 1) No evidence as to the status of defendant Wong. 2) No evidence to show property exempt from San Francisco Rent Ordinance just cause. 3) Fails to provide evidence defendant Chung in possession of the property. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAYESHKUMAR G. DEVDHARA VS. PONCIANO VENTURA CRUZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 23, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT PONCIANO CRUZ, CHINNY PEREZ DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend. Supplemental complaint requires noticed motion. Contains notice that did not exist as of original complaint. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NARENDRA PATEL VS. NICK BACHMAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 23, 2012, line 8. DEFENDANT NICHOLAS BACHMAN MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND continued to 2/6/12. Plaintiff filed notice of unavailability til 2/4/12. (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 23, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT SANDRA CEDILLO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT overruled with 5 days to answer. (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 23, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT JOSE MENDOZA's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS Deny. Defendant appears in case through claim of Right to Possession. (501/REQ)
